name: Mutual Non-Disclosure Agreement
description: A standard Mutual NDA for sharing confidential information between two parties, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys representing technology vendors, procurement teams, boutique firms, and Big Law.

name: Mutual NDA Cover Page
description: Cover page for the Common Paper Mutual NDA, to be completed with counterparty-specific terms and signed to execute the agreement.

name: Cloud Service Agreement
description: A standard agreement for selling and buying cloud software and SaaS products, covering subscription terms, order forms, and standard legal protections, created by a committee of over 40 attorneys.

name: Design Partner Agreement
description: A standard agreement for early-stage product testing and feedback relationships between a vendor and a design partner, enabling pre-launch collaboration under defined terms.

name: Service Level Agreement
description: A standard SLA designed to be attached to the Common Paper Cloud Service Agreement, defining uptime commitments, measurement methodology, and remedies for service failures.

name: Professional Services Agreement
description: A standard agreement for professional services engagements such as consulting, implementation, or other project-based work, covering deliverables, SOW terms, and IP ownership.

name: Data Processing Agreement
description: A standard agreement governing the processing of personal data on behalf of a controller, addressing GDPR and other data protection law requirements.

name: Software License Agreement
description: A standard agreement for licensing on-premise or downloadable software to customers, covering license grants, restrictions, support, and order form terms.

name: Partnership Agreement
description: A standard agreement for formalizing reseller, referral, or other commercial partnership relationships between two companies.

name: Pilot Agreement
description: A standard short-term agreement for product trials and evaluations, allowing a prospective customer to test a product or service before committing to a full commercial contract.

name: Business Associate Agreement
description: A standard agreement for companies handling protected health information (PHI) under HIPAA, defining the obligations of a business associate when processing PHI on behalf of a covered entity.

name: AI Addendum
description: A standard addendum to attach to a software agreement when the product includes AI or machine learning features, covering data use, output ownership, and AI-specific risk allocations.
